articles.title: Patriots rookie earns hefty performance bonus after strong 2025 season
articles.description:
Craig Woodson started 15 games and led all players on the Patriots' defense with 950 total snaps in 2025.

The post Patriots rookie earns hefty performance bonus after strong 2025 season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Craig Woodson started 15 games for the Patriots during the 2025 NFL season.
Woodson led the Patriots' defense with 950 total snaps played.
His performance earned him a significant bonus, impacting team salary cap decisions.

articles.title: Roman Anthony wears Charlie McAvoy’s USA Olympics jersey before WBC final

"To be able to have the success in his career this early, it’s been a lot of fun to watch."

This gesture highlights the camaraderie among Boston athletes across different sports.

articles.title: Ex-Celtic Marcus Smart recalls 2018 incident that almost made him lose his right hand
articles.description:
He punched a picture frame after a close loss to the Lakers. Now, with the glass still in his hand, he plays for them.

The post Ex-Celtic Marcus Smart recalls 2018 incident that almost made him lose his right hand appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Marcus Smart nearly lost his right hand after punching a picture frame in 2018.
The incident occurred following a close loss to the Lakers, impacting his playing career.
Smart now plays for the Lakers, creating a unique rivalry for Boston Celtics fans.

articles.title: Gunman killed and one person hospitalized after a shooting at a Georgia VA clinic, police say
articles.description:
The gunman who was killed is from the Jasper area, Jasper Police Chief Matt Dawkins told reporters at the scene. But details about him were not immediately released.

The post Gunman killed and one person hospitalized after a shooting at a Georgia VA clinic, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gunman killed at Georgia VA clinic; one person hospitalized following the incident.
Jasper Police Chief Matt Dawkins confirmed the shooter was from the Jasper area.
Boston residents should remain vigilant as VA clinics may enhance security measures.

articles.title: Rubio calls for new Cuban leaders as latest blackout underscores deepening economic crisis
articles.description:
The Trump administration is looking for President Miguel Díaz-Canel to leave as the US continues negotiating with the Cuban government, according to a U.S. official and a source.

The post Rubio calls for new Cuban leaders as latest blackout underscores deepening economic crisis appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Senator Marco Rubio urges new leadership in Cuba amid ongoing economic turmoil.
Recent blackouts highlight Cuba's deepening crisis, affecting daily life for citizens.
Boston's Cuban community may face increased uncertainty and advocacy challenges.
